sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me look at the initial state very carefully
initial = history[0].frame
seg = initial.segmentation

print("=== INITIAL STATE ===")
print("All nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} center=({sum(rows)//len(rows)},{sum(cols)//len(cols)}) px={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']} children={n['children']}")

print("\nAdjacency list:")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    print(f"  {pair}")

# Also look at the ascii to understand the layout better
lines = initial.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nFull board rows 24-38:")
for i in range(24, 38):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {lines[i][6:56]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
